title: Institute For Sufi Studies Education
content:
Institute For Sufi Studies Education

The design of our Institute’s educational programs covers the scope of Turkey’s Graduate Proficiency Framework in accordance with the Bologna Process. Program designs are constantly discussed with appropriate units to ensure improvements and currency, then presented to the University Senate by the Institute Board for approval. Institute programs are designed by obtaining the views of internal and external partners with the active involvement of the units’ academic personnel and by keeping in mind student needs.

Classes are taught by the relevant professor.

Advisory processes are constantly active.

Class programs are formed on the basis of maximum student benefit in accordance with the needs of the field.

Class schedules are finalized at the latest 1 week before the beginning of the semester and provided to students.

Bologna updates are finalized before the start of the semester.

Student emails sent to the Solution Center, academic personnel, or to the Institute are responded to within one business day.
